description: Random Category custom List for the Mercenary Missions Event Crafter Situation. Roll when Event Elements directs you to this List. Missions scale upward with Progress Points. From Mythic Magazine #62.

descriptionTranslations.en: Random Category custom List for the Mercenary Missions Event Crafter Situation. Roll when Event Elements directs you to this List. Missions scale upward with Progress Points. From Mythic Magazine #62.

entries.description: Deliver something to some place. Whatever you're delivering and where is likely dangerous.

descriptionTranslations.en: Deliver something to some place. Whatever you're delivering and where is likely dangerous.

entries.description: Deliver something to some place. Whatever you're delivering and where is likely dangerous.

descriptionTranslations.en: Deliver something to some place. Whatever you're delivering and where is likely dangerous.

entries.description: Guard a location, or something at a location, for a certain amount of time. Includes planning the logistics and defending against threats.

descriptionTranslations.en: Guard a location, or something at a location, for a certain amount of time. Includes planning the logistics and defending against threats.

entries.description: Guard someone important. May be stationary or a travel adventure accompanying the protectee to a destination.

descriptionTranslations.en: Guard someone important. May be stationary or a travel adventure accompanying the protectee to a destination.

entries.description: Information gathering mission involving spying, recording what you've found, and returning with intelligence.

descriptionTranslations.en: Information gathering mission involving spying, recording what you've found, and returning with intelligence.

entries.description: Recover an item or person from a location. What you're retrieving and where it is makes this dangerous.

descriptionTranslations.en: Recover an item or person from a location. What you're retrieving and where it is makes this dangerous.

entries.description: Recover an item or person from a location. What you're retrieving and where it is makes this dangerous.

descriptionTranslations.en: Recover an item or person from a location. What you're retrieving and where it is makes this dangerous.

entries.description: Take something that doesn't belong to you, or that someone else is guarding. Similar to Retrieval but with stealth emphasis.

descriptionTranslations.en: Take something that doesn't belong to you, or that someone else is guarding. Similar to Retrieval but with stealth emphasis.

entries.description: Take something that doesn't belong to you, or that someone else is guarding. Similar to Retrieval but with stealth emphasis.

descriptionTranslations.en: Take something that doesn't belong to you, or that someone else is guarding. Similar to Retrieval but with stealth emphasis.

entries.description: Remove a target. This could mean assassination, capture, or neutralization depending on the Context.

descriptionTranslations.en: Remove a target. This could mean assassination, capture, or neutralization depending on the Context.

entries.description: Save someone from captivity or a dangerous situation. Involves locating and extracting the target.

descriptionTranslations.en: Save someone from captivity or a dangerous situation. Involves locating and extracting the target.

entries.description: Infiltrate an organization or group by assuming a false identity. Requires deception and maintaining cover.

descriptionTranslations.en: Infiltrate an organization or group by assuming a false identity. Requires deception and maintaining cover.

entries.description: Prevent someone from achieving their goal. The target and their objective depend on the Context.

descriptionTranslations.en: Prevent someone from achieving their goal. The target and their objective depend on the Context.
